descriptionShort: 2025 banner-night ceremony honoring the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes Centennial Cup championship team.
descriptionLong: Footage from the September 26, 2025 banner-night ceremony celebrating the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes' historic Centennial Cup victory. The event features the official raising of the championship banner and recognition of the team's legacy during the BC Hockey Hall of Fame reunion weekend.
